name: grailzee-eval
description: Grailzee deal-evaluation and report-ingest tools for the grailzee Telegram bot.

tools.name: evaluate_deal
tools.description: Evaluate one Grailzee deal against the v3 bucket cache. Reads brand, reference, and listing_price; optionally narrows by dial_numerals, auction_type, or dial_color when the operator names them. Returns yes/no with math (premium scalar applied uniformly) plus on_plan context. On ambiguous matches, returns candidate buckets so the LLM can ask one clarifying question. Call this for any message containing a brand + reference + dollar amount.

brand.description: Watch brand (e.g. Tudor, Breitling, Cartier, Omega).

reference.description: Reference number as printed by the operator (e.g. 79830RB, 210.30, A17320).

listing_price.description: Listing price the operator can buy at. Accepts $ and commas (e.g. "$2,750" or 2750).

dial_numerals.description: Optional keying axis (e.g. Arabic, Roman, Stick). Pass only when the operator names it.

auction_type.description: Optional keying axis (NR, RES). Pass only when the operator names a listing format.

dial_color.description: Optional keying axis (e.g. Black, Blue, Slate, Green, White, Silver). Pass only when the operator names it.

tools.name: report_pipeline
tools.description: Ingest a Grailzee Pro xlsx report and run the full analyzer pipeline (ingest, glob, run_analysis). Use when the operator says any of: "new report", "report is in", "process the new file", "new Grailzee Pro".

input_xlsx.description: Absolute path to the Grailzee Pro xlsx report dropped by the operator.

output_folder.description: Absolute path to the folder where the run summary lands.
